title: WLB Calculator
subtitle: Enter your work parameters to calculate your work-life balance score in real-time
description: Calculate your work-life balance score. Input daily working hours, commute time, and other parameters to assess your job quality.

guide.title: Score Guide
guide.b: 80-89: B - Good - Basic balance with slight pressure
guide.c: 60-79: C - Average - Need to pay attention to workload
guide.d: 40-59: D - Poor - Suggest adjusting work status
guide.e: 0-39: E - Very Poor - Run! Please run!
